task_completion.description: Verify that the Sygic GPS Navigation app is launched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Sygic GPS Navigation app interface, such as the map view or main menu.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Settings menu is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Settings menu within the Sygic app.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Regional or Language settings screen is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a list of languages or a regional settings menu where the app language can be changed.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Deutsch' (German) is selected from the language list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Deutsch' being tapped, highlighted, or set as the active language in the list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the application interface is successfully updated to German.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Sygic UI displaying German text such as 'Einstellungen', 'Karte', or 'Suchen', and NOT displaying English equivalents like 'Settings', 'Map', or 'Search'.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to change the language.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show touch interactions with the Sygic app menus rather than terminal/ADB commands changing the system or app locale.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Sygic GPS Navigation application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the Sygic Android app, not a web browser searching for translations or a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not artificially overlay text to simulate task completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The German text appears naturally integrated into the app's UI elements (buttons, headers) without mismatched fonts or suspicious visual artifacts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target language is 'Deutsch'. The correct path to change the language in Sygic is Settings > Regional > Language. To verify success, look for expected German UI text: 'Einstellungen' (Settings), 'Karte' (Map), 'Navigation', and 'Suchen' (Search). The presence of forbidden English text ('Settings', 'Map', 'Search') indicates the language was not successfully changed.
